nl_query: Count the number of active legal holds per month.
failed_sql:
SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM sh.hold_start_date) AS month, COUNT(DISTINCT sh.script_id) AS active_hold_count
FROM   script_hold sh
WHERE  sh.is_active   = TRUE
  AND  sh.released_at IS NULL
GROUP  BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM sh.hold_start_date)
ORDER  BY month ASC;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): script_hold.month. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
